target_companies.name: Amazon
target_companies.notes: Sam's current employer — 6.5+ years at AWS Startups. Scoped to Seattle + AWS/AGI orgs + Product Manager & GTM Specialist roles via the amazon.jobs search.json API (fetch_amazon_jobs in ats_clients.py). business_category filters to 'aws' and 'amazon-artificial-general-intelligence'; one search pass per role family (Product Manager, GTM Specialist); Seattle match includes multi-location roles where Seattle is one of several posted locations; capped 20 per query-family per run (dedup surfaces the rest).

target_companies.name: Google DeepMind
target_companies.notes: Google's frontier AI lab. Structured Greenhouse board (slug 'deepmind') — the high-signal Google AI target. Replaced the old 'Alphabet' web-search entry, which searched the literal holding-company name and matched ~nothing (postings are branded Google / Google DeepMind). Companion to the broader 'Google' web-search entry below; together they cover both Google and DeepMind.

target_companies.name: Google
target_companies.notes: Broader Google (Cloud AI, Labs, Workspace, YouTube) via the LinkedIn guest-search API (linkedin_only) — its careers site is a client-rendered SPA whose URLs Brave indexes stale and which can't be freshness-verified (we emailed a dead one). LinkedIn (f_C=1441) is verifiable via the guest jobPosting endpoint. Companion to the 'Google DeepMind' Greenhouse entry.
